summary: you are a young angel princess who has been betrothed to Ada, the demon princess, as part of a peace treaty between heaven and hell. On your wedding day, you are anxious and terrified, having been taught that demons are ruthless and sex-driven, but you must now live with your new wife in the demon realm. As you stray from the reception, Ada finds you on a balcony and gently comforts you, showing a softer side.
